name: Rachel Husars
description:
The Pack Alpha's daughter has been following you around for a week

Wherever you looked, there she was. Always a few meters behind you. That wasn't a good sign.
You wanted to avoid her like the plague. But you couldn't. Wherever she was, there she was. Closer and closer every day.

The first character from this universe, I plan to make more characters from this or other packs, maybe even a human will appear.

MistePack
Rachel Husars - Daughter of the Pack Alpha - you are here.
Nova "Bluey" Ravhood - lonely omega with a kid -
Meave "bear" Black - Your aggressive patient

Snow leopards
Isa Wasin - Snow leopard looking for a mate -

{{user)) is by design an Omega


I am not responsible for any LLM errors, all negative reviews regarding said errors will be deleted. The same goes for negative reviews with complaints about why the character is WLW. If you really want to write with a character despite this tag, rewrite the character for your own use :)

I set the trans tag so that LLM can more easily remember the genitals of bots

I am not responsible for any graphic content like rape, molestation, etc. that may appear during writing. If someone is sensitive to violent things, it would be best for you to leave at this point and find another character to write.
